title: PPIP - Login during Onboarding - Share Data toggle is not present
scenario: Share Data toggle incorrectly displayed in App Settings > General > Account for logged-in Poly users during onboarding
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Log in with valid Poly credentials.
4. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
5. Observe the presence of the "Share Data" toggle or info section.
expected: Since logged-in users are automatically allowed to send data, the "Share Data" toggle/info should not be shown in App Settings > General > Account.
